# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

kind: Service
apiVersion: v1
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 9376
  type: LoadBalancer
---
kind: Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-container
        image: my-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9376
---
kind: EnvoyFilter
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-app
  filters:
  - listener:
      portNumber: 80
      filterChain:
        filters:
        - name: envoy.router
          config: {}
  - listener:
      portNumber: 80
      filterChain:
        filters:
        - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
          config:
            statPrefix: my-service
            routeConfig:
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: /
                route:
                  clusterHeader: x-forwarded-host
              - match:
                  prefix: /healthz
                route:
                  clusterHeader: x-forwarded-host
            httpFilters:
            - name: envoy.retry
              config:
                retry_on: connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
                num_retries: 3
                per_try_timeout: 10s
            - name: envoy.http_timeout
              config:
                timeout_ms: 30000
